_comment: Pred-09-5 matching principle: stable receivers satisfy TI ~ 1/H. Maps environmental entropy H [0,1] to recommended TI [0,100]. Validated with large effect sizes (d=1.1-4.3) at H<=0.27. Above H=0.27, TI clips to TI_MIN and IMM-tuned and hand-tuned conditions converge — the Matching Principle loses resolution. This is a floor-binding artifact, not a falsification.
_source: IMM Paper 9, RPCS-1. Benchmark validation: Pred-09-5 study, May 2026.

oscillation_threshold._comment: Paper 9 §oscillatory threshold: SG × TI > max_product_SG_TI triggers oscillation risk warning
